name: The Fool
desc: A blank slate. The beginning of a journey. Unbound by structure. Resonance detected with Hako Yamazaki (25 scrobbles).

name: The Magician
desc: As above, so below. Converting will into reality through action. Resonance detected with JAMEZY (12 scrobbles).

name: High Priestess
desc: The mystery behind the veil. Trust the silence within. Resonance detected with Synthetic Epiphany (7 scrobbles).

name: The Empress
desc: Fertility of mind and spirit. Nature in its digital bloom. Resonance detected with Nova Koma (6 scrobbles).

name: The Emperor
desc: Structure and solidity. The foundation upon which empires are built. Resonance detected with EJ Kitto (5 scrobbles).

name: The Hierophant
desc: Traditional wisdom and systemic knowledge. The bridge to the divine API. Resonance detected with Infected Mushroom (4 scrobbles).

name: The Lovers
desc: Perfect harmony of opposing forces. Choice based on shared frequency. Resonance detected with Fred again.. (4 scrobbles).

name: The Chariot
desc: Victory through discipline. Moving forward despite opposing forces. Resonance detected with Bladerunner (3 scrobbles).

name: Strength
desc: Inner power and compassionate control. Taming the glitch within. Resonance detected with Zeitgeist (3 scrobbles).

name: The Hermit
desc: Seeking the light within. Solitude is the forge of wisdom. Resonance detected with The Polish Ambassador (3 scrobbles).

name: Wheel of Fortune
desc: The inevitable spin of the system. Cycles of data and destiny. Resonance detected with Just A Gent (3 scrobbles).

name: Justice
desc: Fairness and systemic balance. Cause and effect in perfect sync. Resonance detected with Matt Mason (3 scrobbles).

name: Death
desc: The end of a cycle. Clearing the old to make space for the new. Resonance detected with David Bowie (3 scrobbles).

name: The Star
desc: Renewal and inspiration. The calm after the storm. Resonance detected with Meridian (3 scrobbles).

name: The Moon
desc: The subconscious realm. Navigating the shadows of the network. Resonance detected with DEGS (3 scrobbles).

name: The Sun
desc: Absolute clarity and vital energy. The system at peak performance. Resonance detected with Denver UK (3 scrobbles).

name: The Glitch
desc: A systematic error that became an entity. Reality is a suggestion. Resonance detected with Drz (3 scrobbles).
